title: [codereview] EDHOC A_3 fix requires consistent changes in Rust and Python impls
description: P1: Triple implementation discipline requires updating lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs (2 places) and python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py to prevent interop failure on A_3 AAD. Use same ext_aad = TH_3 || CRED.
